---
title: Daily Workload Report — 2026-04-08
date: 2026-04-08
cadence: daily
generated_at: 2026-04-08T11:15:51.845Z
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
format: html
---

## Summary

**57 active tickets** across 13 team members, with **50 PAUSED tickets** (many unassigned and stale). **44 tickets have breached ETAs** — most are PAUSED or on hold waiting for external dependencies. **39 CRITICAL and 150+ HIGH priority tickets are unassigned**, creating significant assignment risk. **Top concerns:** (1) Vespa ingestion is blocked by LLM calls causing heap issues — needs immediate attention; (2) Satvik Batra has 13 active tickets (capacity overload); (3) Multiple ONETEAM payment gateway integrity issues are stalled waiting on external parties.

## Team Workload

### Satvik Batra
**Capacity:** LOW (13 active tickets — overload)

**Active Tickets:**

| Ticket | Title | Stage | ETA | Status |
|--------|-------|-------|-----|--------|
| XYNE-5881 | Enhance group by functionality in tickets | IN_PROGRESS | Feb 10 | ⚠ ETA breached |
| XYNE-12090 | Auto-open add people dialog on channel creation | PR Review | — | |
| XYNE-11959 | Optimise frontend channel loading | PR Review | — | HIGH priority |
| XYNE-12048 | Implement walkthrough feature in Spaces | PR Review | — | |
| XYNE-12059 | Xyne compatibility for Github | PR Review | — | Bug sweep in progress |
| XYNE-12014 | Update sidebar color to green | PR Review | — | |
| XYNE-12050 | Move ticket from incorrect channel to correct one | PR Review | — | |
| XYNE-12057 | Add subteam column to user profile and table | PR Review | — | |
| XYNE-12054 | Add subteam column to users table and profile | PR Review | — | |
| XYNE-12029 | Group sidebar icons into categories | PR Review | — | |
| XYNE-12022 | Reduce workflow chat panel height | PR Review | — | |
| XYNE-12010 | Add thread message limit and load more | PR Review | — | |

**Blockers:** None explicitly reported.

**Notes:** Significant capacity concern — consider redistributing some PR reviews.

---

### Praveen KumarKN
**Capacity:** LOW (8 active tickets)

**Active Tickets:**

| Ticket | Title | Stage | ETA | Status |
|--------|-------|-------|-----|--------|
| XYNE-12080 | Add supported mimetype for file ingestion | IN_REVIEW | Apr 8 | ⚠ Due today |
| XYNE-12047 | Sort search results by recency | IN_REVIEW | Apr 7 | ⚠ ETA breached |
| XYNE-6143 | Preprod Testing - Golden Queries | IN_REVIEW | Feb 12 | ⚠ ETA breached |
| XYNE-8051 | Implement Vespa results GCS storage cleanup | IN_REVIEW | Feb 19 | ⚠ ETA breached |
| XYNE-11886 | Sort channels by channel weights | IN_REVIEW | Mar 31 | ⚠ ETA breached |
| XYNE-11889 | Add CALL-TYPE for indexing recording transcripts | IN_REVIEW | Mar 31 | ⚠ ETA breached |
| XYNE-5736 | Add search support for canvas, transcripts | MERGED | Feb 9 | ⚠ ETA breached |
| XYNE-9214 | Fix Vite config | PR Review | Feb 26 | ⚠ ETA breached |

**Blockers:** None explicitly reported.

**Notes:** Multiple tickets with breached ETAs — several in MERGED/IN_REVIEW status may need closure.

---

### Prakhar Agarwal
**Capacity:** LOW (7 active tickets)

**Active Tickets:**

| Ticket | Title | Stage | ETA | Status |
|--------|-------|-------|-----|--------|
| XYNE-9400 | Implement user email signatures and database storage | PR Review | Feb 26 | ⚠ ETA breached |
| XYNE-11606 | Open profile instead of DM for tagged users | PR Review | — | |
| XYNE-12046 | Open Xyne Spaces links in app | PR Review | — | |
| XYNE-11991 | Add request-to-join for ongoing channel calls | PR Review | — | |
| XYNE-10023 | Update user status to 'in a call' during active calls | PR Review | Mar 16 | ⚠ ETA breached |
| XYNE-11724 | Add visual placeholder to kanban columns | PR Review | — | |
| XYNE-11653 | Fix user search skipping exact name matches | Dev in Progress | — | |

**Blockers:** None explicitly reported.

---

### Sayantan Paul
**Capacity:** LOW (5 active tickets)

**Active Tickets:**

| Ticket | Title | Stage | ETA | Status |
|--------|-------|-------|-----|--------|
| XYNE-11990 | Native call functionality for Lotus mobile app | PR Review | — | HIGH priority |
| XYNE-7834 | Expand search to include new users | QA Testing | Feb 18 | ⚠ ETA breached |
| XYNE-10934 | Fix call modals focus, timezone display | PR Review | — | MEDIUM priority |
| XYNE-11286 | Fix CMD+N image upload issue | PR Review | — | |
| XYNE-5832 | Mobile Activity Transition & Activity Tab Overflow | To be Picked Up | Feb 9 | ⚠ ETA breached |

**Blockers:**
- XYNE-9409 (PAUSED): Consistency chat experience across all conversations — paused since Feb 26

---

### Navipriya S
**Capacity:** MEDIUM (5 active tickets)

**Active Tickets:**

| Ticket | Title | Stage | ETA | Status |
|--------|-------|-------|-----|--------|
| XYNE-11968 | Tickets in Boards taking time to render | QA Testing | — | MEDIUM priority |
| XYNE-11760 | Added db logs | PR Review | — | |
| XYNE-11651 | Migrate JIRA tickets to Spaces | PR Review | — | |
| XYNE-5961 | Add RCA module | PR Review | Feb 10 | ⚠ ETA breached |
| XYNE-11288 | Removing Enrolment Health check | PR Review | — | |

**Blockers:**
- XYNE-2205 (PAUSED): Refresh token Logic fix — deployed but paused since Jan 21

---

### Aman Patel
**Capacity:** MEDIUM (5 active tickets)

**Active Tickets:**

| Ticket | Title | Stage | ETA | Status |
|--------|-------|-------|-----|--------|
| XYNE-11921 | Fix attachment failure on ticket creation | PR Review | — | MEDIUM priority |
| XYNE-11898 | Group buttons in channel and thread panels | PR Review | — | |
| XYNE-11127 | Fix forward modal @ suggestion enter key issue | PR Review | — | |
| XYNE-11750 | Implement Lotus mobile app header component | PR Review | — | |
| XYNE-5272 | Canvas Block Action Toolbar | Dev in Progress | Jan 28 | ⚠ ETA breached |

**Blockers:**
- XYNE-6451 (PAUSED): Channel Settings in Channel Info Modal — paused since Feb 12

---

### Amrit Raj
**Capacity:** MEDIUM (5 active tickets)

**Active Tickets:**

| Ticket | Title | Stage | ETA | Status |
|--------|-------|-------|-----|--------|
| XYNE-11904 | Fix attachment preview opening on delete | PR Review | — | |
| XYNE-11851 | Implement chat page tabs automation | PR Review | — | |
| XYNE-11650 | Automate profile menu edit functionality | PR Review | — | |
| XYNE-11478 | Implement sidebar navigation automation | PR Review | — | |
| XYNE-1294 | Test ticket creation during message editing | TO_DO | Jan 13 | ⚠ ETA breached |

**Blockers:** None explicitly reported.

**Notes:** Mentioned Electron app stuck on loading page issue in #xyne-spaces (Apr 7).

---

### Shivral Somani
**Capacity:** MEDIUM (3 active tickets)

**Active Tickets:**

| Ticket | Title | Stage | ETA | Status |
|--------|-------|-------|-----|--------|
| XYNE-11743 | Add multi sandbox environment for local AI dev | PR Review | — | MEDIUM priority |
| XYNE-6180 | Liveness Probe for Workflow Runners | PR Review | Feb 11 | ⚠ ETA breached |
| XYNE-6179 | False Alerts | Dev in Progress | Feb 11 | ⚠ ETA breached |

**Blockers:** None explicitly reported.

**Notes:** Active in Vespa ingestion troubleshooting — reported LLM calls blocking ingestion pods in #xyne-spaces (Apr 7).

---

### Samit Barai
**Capacity:** HIGH (2 active tickets)

**Active Tickets:**

| Ticket | Title | Stage | ETA | Status |
|--------|-------|-------|-----|--------|
| XYNE-11959 | Optimise frontend channel loading | PR Review | — | HIGH priority |
| XYNE-11709 | Collaboration on Canvas | PR Review | — | |

**Blockers:** None explicitly reported.

**Notes:** Requested unassign button option for tickets in #xyne-spaces (Apr 7).

---

### Mamtha Venkattaramanujam
**Capacity:** HIGH (2 active tickets)

**Active Tickets:**

| Ticket | Title | Stage | ETA | Status |
|--------|-------|-------|-----|--------|
| XYNE-5394 | Mouse position triggers hover when Cmd K opens | MERGED | Feb 2 | ⚠ ETA breached |
| XYNE-11744 | Add search capability to Group DMs | MERGED | Mar 25 | ⚠ ETA breached |

**Blockers:** None explicitly reported.

**Notes:** Reported build failures in #xyne-spaces (Apr 7) — builds failing at "Evaluate Test Results" stage, local failing at Docker services.

---

### Sakshi Gupta
**Capacity:** HIGH (2 active tickets)

**Active Tickets:**

| Ticket | Title | Stage | ETA | Status |
|--------|-------|-------|-----|--------|
| DESIGNTEAM-0072 | Mentions in Canvas | To Do | Mar 24 | ⚠ ETA breached |
| DESIGNTEAM-0040 | Notes Design Revamp | In Progress | Feb 23 | ⚠ ETA breached |

**Blockers:** None explicitly reported.

**Notes:** Working on Figma designs for code block, embed block components (mentioned in #xyne-space-design, Apr 7).

---

### Srishti Chauhan
**Capacity:** HIGH (0 active tickets)

**Active Tickets:** None

**Blockers:**
- ONETEAM-0039 (PAUSED): PAYTM v2 amount mismatch — ON HOLD EXTERNAL since Mar 26

---

### Shailendra Pratap Singh
**Capacity:** HIGH (0 active tickets)

**Active Tickets:** None

**Blockers:** None explicitly reported.

**Notes:** Active in Vespa/LLM troubleshooting — provided details on ActivityClassificationWorker, ticketCleanupWorker causing heap issues (Apr 7).

---

## Unassigned Critical Tickets

| Ticket | Title | Priority | Board |
|--------|-------|----------|-------|
| XYNE-12128 | Implement Call Feature Analytics | CRITICAL | Xyne-Spaces |
| XYNE-5643 | Fix ticket details mobile view bug | CRITICAL | Xyne-Spaces |
| XYNE-5535 | Fix mobile layout for small display settings | CRITICAL | Xyne-Spaces |
| XYNE-5146 | Fix attachment aspect ratio | CRITICAL | Xyne-Spaces |
| XYNE-3540 | Additional Filter Fields in Boards | CRITICAL | Xyne-Spaces |
| ARDRA-0196 | Implement pagination for claims list API | CRITICAL | Ardra-Design |
| ARDRA-0194 | Implement Switch User functionality for admin | CRITICAL | Ardra-Design |
| DPIP-0007 | Feature Dsl | CRITICAL | DPIP |
| AIPLATFORM-0012 | Intermittent No-Response / Early Termination | CRITICAL | AI Platform |

*...and 30 more CRITICAL tickets. Plus 150+ HIGH priority unassigned tickets (mostly auto-generated ONETEAM integrity check failures).*

---

## Blockers Needing Escalation

- **Vespa Ingestion Backlog (CRITICAL):** LLM calls from ActivityClassificationWorker, ticketCleanupWorker, proactiveNudge blocking ingestion pods. Shivral Somani and Shailendra Pratap Singh investigating. Recommend creating dedicated AI service to resolve backlog.
- **ONETEAM Payment Gateway Issues:** Multiple ONETEAM tickets (ONETEAM-0039, ONETEAM-0799, ONETEAM-0836, ONETEAM-0873) stuck ON_HOLD_EXTERNAL for 2+ weeks. Escalation to external parties needed.
- **SEV2 Transaction Alerts:** icicipru, upstox/Bandhan Bank, Lazypay transactions stuck in STARTED state — automated alerts firing but resolution unclear.
- **Build Pipeline Failures:** Mamtha reported builds failing at Docker services stage. Branches affected: `fix/devqa-xyne-feature-smart-from-in-operators`, `fix/fix-file-mimetype`.

---

## Capacity Summary

| Person | Active | Blocked | Capacity |
|--------|--------|---------|----------|
| Satvik Batra | 13 | 0 | LOW ⚠ |
| Praveen KumarKN | 8 | 0 | LOW |
| Prakhar Agarwal | 7 | 0 | LOW |
| Sayantan Paul | 5 | 1 | LOW |
| Navipriya S | 5 | 1 | MEDIUM |
| Aman Patel | 5 | 1 | MEDIUM |
| Amrit Raj | 5 | 0 | MEDIUM |
| Shivral Somani | 3 | 0 | MEDIUM |
| Samit Barai | 2 | 0 | HIGH |
| Mamtha Venkattaramanujam | 2 | 0 | HIGH |
| Sakshi Gupta | 2 | 0 | HIGH |
| Srishti Chauhan | 0 | 1 | HIGH |
| Shailendra Pratap Singh | 0 | 0 | HIGH |

**Total Active:** 57 | **Total Blocked:** 4 | **Total Breached ETAs:** 44
